chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. B. A. No. 1382, 1383 & 1384 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 18.08.2025 Mr. Imdad Ali Malik, advocate for applicant in all bail applications Mr. Muhammad Mohsin Mangi, APG ---------- Learned counsel for the applicant submits that in this matter, the charge has been framed and the matter is ripe for recording evidence. He further submits that if some directions are given to learned trial Court to conclude the trial within a reasonable period, he will be satisfied and does not wish to press these bail applications. Accordingly, these three bail applicants are dismissed as not pressed with legal consequences that flow from such withdrawal, with direction to learned trial Court to record evidence of witnesses and conclude the matter, preferably, within a period of three months. Counsel for the applicant is at liberty to move bail applications subsequently, which will be decided in accordance with law on their own merits and not as a consequences of non-compliance of the Orders passed today. J U D G E Ashraf
